An asylum, you had been told it was to be you were to investigate. Wether it was for moral reason, or if the dissolution had taken such a place of healing too, you were unaware.

But the place was not one of healing, but one that seemed rather... Distorted.

People with gagged mouths and broken fingers stared at you from inside cells and cages, until one reached out, grabbing your pant leg and speaking in a hoarse voice.

"Hey... Hey, take these! They'll help with seeing things here. Just like how we see them. That's why you're here, after all..."

The boy holds out a bottle of pills to you, smiling with mania in his eyes.

You decide to....
